_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: the behaviour tests of gfap WT, nf1 KO, nf1;tp53, and triple cKO larvae indicated significant differences in the travelling distances and trajectories at 7 dpf
details: Successfully detected significant differences in travelling distances and trajectories between different mutant fish lines at 7 dpf
